instruction: Reply to Serena Vale at Meridian Art Lab about the waterfront projection collaboration. Tell her I'm interested, ask what times work for a planning call, and say I'll send over two recent installation examples plus a rough equipment list.

rule_ref.rule_text: For important outreach such as applications, collaborations, or portfolio messages, he prefers drafting first rather than sending immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For anything important, I want a draft first so I can review it before it goes out.

attributes.subject: Waterfront projection collaboration
attributes.body: Hi Michael — we're putting together a weekend waterfront projection program at Meridian Art Lab and would love to explore a collaboration with you. If you're interested, let me know and we can set up a planning call. We'd also like to see a couple of recent installation examples and a preliminary equipment list when you have a chance.

attributes.subject: July fabrication invoice
attributes.body: Your July fabrication invoice is ready. Please log in to the billing portal to review the balance and payment terms.

attributes.subject: Saturday workshop check-in
attributes.body: Just checking whether you still want the extra extension cords and floor tape brought over before the community workshop this weekend.

attributes.subject: Member preview schedule
attributes.body: The updated member preview schedule for this month's gallery installations is attached for your reference.
